variants.primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#007AFF] to-[#0056b3] text-white hover:brightness-110 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,122,255,0.4)]
variants.secondary: bg-white/10 text-white hover:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10

Card.styles: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-[#121212] border border-white/5 transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20

Input.styles: h-12 rounded-xl bg-white/5 border-white/10 text-white placeholder:text-white/40 focus:border-[#007AFF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#007AFF] transition-all

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Install 'lucide-react' for icons. Use 'Outfit' font from Google Fonts for headings and 'Inter' for body.
2. THEME: Force DARK MODE by default. The app should feel like a night concert.
3. HERO: Use the 'hero_bg' image with a heavy gradient overlay so text is readable. Place the Logo as a watermark (opacity 10-20%) behind the main text or in a corner.
4. SEARCH: Create a prominent search bar in the Hero section. It should look like a premium glass element.
5. CARDS: Event cards should have a high-quality image, date badge (floating), title, venue, and a 'Buy Ticket' button that appears/highlights on hover.
6. NAVIGATION: Sticky header with glassmorphism. Links: Eventos, Sedes (Venues), Nosotros (About), Contacto.
7. FOOTER: Simple dark footer with contact info and policies.
8. RESPONSIVE: Ensure the grid collapses to 1 column on mobile. Touch targets must be 44px+.
9. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid attributes to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Do not use generic centered layouts everywhere. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, active).
Do not use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
